log_entry: DE bearing running hot at 84C, audible growl at 1480 rpm. Vibration band 2x line freq elevated, trending up over 3 shifts.
notes: Classic outer/inner race signature: high housing temp + growl + 2x-line-freq vibration. Resolution should reference bearing replacement and re-greasing.

log_entry: NDE bearing vibration trending up to 7.8 mm/s RMS over 3 shifts. Slight axial play felt by hand on the cooling tower fan.
notes: Rising RMS vibration plus axial play indicates bearing wear. Correct answer should cite vibration trend and recommend bearing change at next PM.

log_entry: Outer race spalling suspected on conveyor head pulley. Grease purge showed metal flake. Noise increases under load.
notes: Metal flake in grease + load-dependent noise is strong bearing-fault evidence. Should recommend bearing/seal swap and coupling alignment.

log_entry: Rumble at the drive end on extruder 2, inner race defect frequency present in FFT. Bearing noise rises under load.
notes: FFT inner-race defect frequency is a definitive bearing indicator. Should reference spectral evidence and bearing replacement.

log_entry: Gearbox oil level below min on sight glass, slight weep at output seal. Oil dark and overdue for change on line 3 drive.
notes: Low oil + seal weep + degraded oil. Resolution should top up oil, address the seal weep, and schedule an oil change.

log_entry: Auto-luber empty on line 3 drive, no grease delivered for 2 days. Bearing temp creeping up.
notes: Root cause is starved lubrication from an empty auto-luber, not the bearing itself. Refill/reset luber and verify grease delivery before temp causes damage.

log_entry: Oil sample flagged high particle count, ISO code out of spec. Filter dP high and bypass open on the main compressor.
notes: Contaminated oil + clogged filter in bypass. Should change oil and filter and re-sample; references particle count / ISO code.

log_entry: No oil flow indicated at the pump, grease line blocked to bearing in the mixing area.
notes: Blocked lubrication delivery path. Should clear the line, confirm flow, and monitor the affected bearing.

log_entry: VFD tripped on overcurrent, fault F012. Motor megger 2.1 Mohm marginal, phase imbalance ~6% on line 2.
notes: Overcurrent trip + marginal insulation + phase imbalance point to motor/drive electrical issue. Should reference megger retest and VFD reset.

log_entry: Contactor chattering on starter, coil voltage low. Aux contact pitted, intermittent drop-out under load.
notes: Control-circuit fault: chattering contactor and pitted aux contact. Should recommend contactor replacement and coil-voltage check.

log_entry: Heater element open on circuit 4, no current draw. Thermal overload reset would not hold.
notes: Open heater element / failed overload. Should swap the element and verify balanced current draw.

log_entry: Loose lug on terminal B2, discoloration and heat. Ground fault on feeder, trip on close at the packaging line.
notes: Loose/overheated termination and ground fault. Should re-terminate, torque to spec, and thermal-scan after.

log_entry: Flow transmitter reading 4% high vs reference. Zero drifted, last cal 14 months ago. Loop check ok.
notes: Instrument reads high with a healthy loop and overdue cal date -> drift, not a process fault. Should re-zero/trim span and update cal record.

log_entry: Temp RTD on reactor showing 3C offset vs handheld. Drift linear across range since last PM.
notes: Consistent linear offset vs a trusted reference is calibration drift. Should recalibrate or replace the RTD and verify the loop.

log_entry: Load cell on hopper out of cal, weight readback off by 12 kg. Span needs re-trim.
notes: Weight readback error with a span-trim need is a calibration issue. Should re-trim span and verify against test weights.

log_entry: PLC comms dropout to remote IO rack, watchdog timeout. HMI froze and recovered on restart.
notes: Control-system/comms fault, not mechanical. Should restart the IO scanner, restore comms, and add a watchdog alarm.

log_entry: Batch sequence stuck on step 7, logic waiting on a flag that never set. Manual force to advance.
notes: Logic/sequencing bug. Should patch the logic for the missing flag and retest the batch.

log_entry: SCADA tag quality bad on 6 points after firmware update, driver mismatch suspected. Timestamp skew between PLC and historian.
notes: Post-update driver/firmware mismatch causing bad tag quality. Should reload matching driver, document firmware rev, and verify tag quality.

log_entry: Bearing temp creeping up and vibration slightly elevated, but auto-luber reservoir found empty. Unclear if the bearing is failing or just starved of grease.
notes: AMBIGUOUS: symptoms read like bearing_fault (temp + vibration) but the empty auto-luber points to lubrication_issue as the root cause. A correct answer should note the overlap, prioritize refilling/verifying lubrication, and recommend re-checking vibration before condemning the bearing.

log_entry: VFD faulting intermittently and motor vibration is up; encoder signal dropping at speed. Could be a drive/electrical issue or a mechanical bearing problem feeding back through the encoder.
notes: AMBIGUOUS: encoder signal dropout + VFD faults suggest electrical_fault, but elevated motor vibration could indicate bearing_fault. A correct answer should acknowledge both, recommend checking the encoder/drive wiring first while trending vibration, and avoid committing to one cause without more evidence.
